title: XPeng Heads Into Q1 With Profitability Momentum but Softer Revenue Guidance
text: XPeng showed profitability momentum heading into Q1 2026 but provided softer revenue guidance that concerned investors. The company achieved its first-ever quarterly net profit in Q4 2025, exceeding CNY 380 million, with Q4 2025 total revenue of CNY 22.25 billion, up 38.2% year-over-year. Full-year 2025 revenues rose 87.7% to CNY 76.72 billion with gross margin reaching a record 21.3%. Annual deliveries reached 429,445 units in 2025, up 125.9% year-over-year, with overseas deliveries nearly doubling to 45,000 units. However, Q1 2026 deliveries guidance of 61,000–66,000 units with revenue guidance of RMB 12.2–13.2 billion introduced doubt because the revenue range implied a year-over-year decline. This softer momentum guidance arrived despite company-linked materials indicating profitability progress.
